mapper.sql: index_id, park_key, car_no, order_no, car_type_no, out_time, out_gate_name, out_operator_name, lock_car, out_img_path, free_reason, total_amount, enter_time,create_time,update_time
mapper.insert:
insert into get_out_car (index_id, park_key, car_no, order_no, car_type_no, out_time, out_gate_name, out_operator_name, lock_car, out_img_path, free_reason, total_amount, enter_time,create_time,update_time ) values
( #{item.indexId}, #{item.parkKey}, #{item.carNo}, #{item.orderNo}, #{item.carTypeNo}, #{item.outTime}, #{item.outGateName}, #{item.outOperatorName}, #{item.lockCar}, #{item.outImgPath}, #{item.freeReason}, #{item.totalAmount}, #{item.enterTime}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateTime} )
on duplicate key update order_no = values(order_no), car_type_no = values(car_type_no), out_time = values(out_time), update_time = sysdate()
